description: H1 scale curve (pre-registered extension): CUDA<->MPS next-token prediction disagreement vs model size, 4 points 10.9/31.9/49.7/72.0M = 0.1/11.1/13.2/13.9% (3-seed). Divergence emerges sharply between 10M and 30M then saturates ~11-14%. Right panel: per-step onset (seed 0), 11M flat vs larger models crossing onset by step 400-800.
